name: DocJacket
description: DocJacket MCP server — paste-URL-and-go AI access to real estate transactions, key dates, contingencies, tasks, contacts, missing documents, and contract intake for independent Transaction Coordinators.

security.tenant_isolation: Every backing query filters on organization_id resolved from the token. Cross-tenant access returns 403 Forbidden, not 404 Not Found, so existence is not leaked.
security.audit_logging: Every tool call is logged with org_id, token_id, tool_name, args_summary (PII-scrubbed), latency_ms, and outcome.
security.per_token_revocation: Tokens can be revoked individually from DocJacket Settings → AI Access without affecting other AI surfaces.
security.approval_gate: Write tools (send, create, update, apply) execute only after the user confirms in the assistant's chat. The conversation is the approval gate; DocJacket trusts the chat affirmation and executes when called.

pricing.description: Included with DocJacket Pro at no additional cost. The user provides their own AI client subscription (Claude Pro, ChatGPT Plus, Cowork seat, Codex for Work, Gemini, Cursor, etc.).

policies.data_handling: DocJacket reads only the data of the OAuth-authenticating user's organization. AI client prompts are not logged — only the resulting tool calls.

tool_catalog.live_inventory: Call the `mcp_catalog` tool to get the live list of every exposed tool with description and scope.
